command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205 '
echo "=== REVERT moreno-gmail-bridge ==="
BRIDGE=/home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-gmail-bridge
BACKUP=/home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-gmail-bridge.pre-async-fix

if [ -f "$BACKUP" ]; then
    cp "$BACKUP" "$BRIDGE"
    chmod +x "$BRIDGE"
    # Verify it matches original
    echo "SHA256 after revert: $(sha256sum $BRIDGE | cut -d" " -f1)"
    python3 -c "import ast; ast.parse(open("$BRIDGE").read()); print("SYNTAX_OK")"
    echo "REVERTED OK"
else
    echo "BACKUP NOT FOUND — checking what exists"
    ls /home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-gmail-bridge* 2>/dev/null
fi
' 2>&1
echo DONE_2022
